page.title: AI Model Settings
page.description: Configure models and providers for chat and document analysis. Keys are stored securely.

section.credentialsDescription: Select an AI provider and configure API credentials.
section.modelDescription: Select a model for chat and document analysis, or enter a custom model name.

form.loadError: Failed to load configuration. Please refresh the page.
form.apiKeyHelperCustom: Enter API Key and Base URL to fetch available models
form.apiKeyHelper: Enter API Key to auto-fetch available models
form.modelHelper: Select from the list or enter a custom model name
form.clearConfirmDescription: This will delete your current model, key, and parameter settings. This action cannot be undone.
form.modelsError: Failed to load models. Please refresh.
form.needsApiKey: Please enter an API Key first
form.needsApiKeyAndBaseUrl: Please enter API Key and Base URL first
form.modelRequired: Please select or enter a model first
form.apiKeyRequired: Please enter an API Key first
form.apiKeyAndBaseUrlRequired: Please enter API Key and Base URL first
form.testFailed: Connection failed. Please check API Key, model, and Base URL.

sidebar.step1: Select an AI provider (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.)
sidebar.step2: Enter the corresponding API Key and endpoint URL
sidebar.step3: Choose a model from the list, or enter a custom name
sidebar.step4: Click "Test Connection" to verify, then save
sidebar.securityDescription: API keys are stored with encryption and only used for server-side communication with AI providers. They are never exposed to the frontend or logs.
